sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12328" key="a)poga/laktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπογᾰ´λακτ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n12328.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weaned,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg004:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
